stemHtml:
The following is an extract from a NOTAM briefing for the planned aerodrome of destination of an IFR flight:

B) FROM: 13/02/01 11:00C TO: 13/02/01 12:00 E NDB CLB 433KHZ U/S

Which of the following statements is completely correct?

options.a: Navigation facilities ‘NDB’ and ‘CLB’, both transmitting on 433 kHz, are unavailable for use between 11:00 and 12:00 on the morning of 13 February.
options.b: The ‘CLB’ NDB is unserviceable between 11:00 and 12:00 on 13 February and military aircraft able to transmit and receive voice communications on 433 kHz should also note that this frequency will be unguarded for the same time period.
options.c: The ‘CLB’ navigation facility, a non-directional beacon, will be out of service for one hour on the 1 February 2013.
options.d: Aircraft with a navigational data base should be aware that, at the destination airfield IATA identifier ‘CLB’, the frequency band 433 kHz will be out of service from 11:00 to 12:00 on 1 February 2013.
